name: FACT: Feasibility-Aware Cost-Tuned framework for Predictive Maintenance

stages.name: Feasibility Screening
stages.question: Can this data support predictive maintenance at all?
stages.method: Compute PR-AUC lift over random baseline
stages.decision_rule: Lift > 2x: proceed. Lift 1.2-2x: proceed with caution. Lift < 1.2x: STOP, fix data collection
stages.evidence: EV Charging (1.01x) flagged as infeasible; CNC (23.8x) and Irrigation (1.6x) cleared

stages.name: Imbalance Assessment
stages.question: Is reported accuracy hiding poor failure detection?
stages.method: Check imbalance ratio and report recall, not just accuracy
stages.decision_rule: Ratio >40:1: resampling essential. 10-40:1: compare strategies, threshold tuning often best. <5:1: minimal intervention
stages.evidence: Azure (48:1) accuracy 0.98 but recall 0.003 without intervention

stages.name: Cost-Tuned Deployment
stages.question: What decision threshold matches business priorities?
stages.method: Set threshold by cost ratio of missed failure to false alarm
stages.evidence: Threshold tuning matched SMOTE recall (0.78) with higher F1 (0.74 vs 0.56)
